title: Falcon Cloak
effect: For ten hours, the wearer becomes a falcon whose level is equal to the artifact level. The falcon can fly a long distance each round, or up to 60 miles (97 km) per hour when traveling overland.
depletion: 1 in 1d100 Most magic items that turn a character into a different creature make it difficult to use any of the character’s special abilities (other than skills) in that form.
